file.content:
---

type: OKR

date: <% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD") %>

aliases: []

tags:

- review/weekly

---

## End-of-week checklist

  

- ### Get to Inbox Zero

- [ ] E-mail

- [ ] Obsidian


- ### GTD Review

- [ ] Review Calendar

- [ ] Review Reminder

- [ ] Review Project

- ### Home

- [ ] Tidy room

- [ ] Tidy desk

  

## Monthly initiatives

  
  

> [!Attention] Pay attention to this

> Keep these things in mind as you do this week's review

  
[[{{DATE:YYYY-MM}}]]



## Last week

  
[[<% tp.date.now("YYYY-WW", -1, "weeks") %>]]

```dataview

table file.ctime.weekday as weekday

from "Daily"

where file.ctime >= date(today) - dur(6 days)

```

  
  

> [!question] Questions to ask

> 1. What were your goals last week, and did you finish them?

> 2. What are you changing so that you can do them this month?

  



  

## This week

  

> [!question] Questions to ask

> 1. If you could only get 5 specific goals done this week, what would they be?

> 2. How do they relate to your monthly initiatives and yearly OKRs?

  

- [ ]

- [ ]

- [ ]

- [ ]

- [ ]

file.content:
--- type: OKR tags: - review/daily date: <% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD-dddd") %> Speaking: false Exercise: --- ## DIRECTION ![[Weekly/<% tp.date.now("YYYY-ww", -7) %>#This week]] ## GET READY ### Confirmations - email ### GTD & Top 3 Tasks - [ ] ### Morning Checklist - [ ] drink enough water - [ ] English podcast - [ ] Morning News - [ ] Syncthing ## RELATIONSHIP ### Family ```dataview table without ID file.link as "Family", date_last_spoken as "Last Time" from #people/family where follow_up = true and date_last_spoken <= date(today) - dur(2 days) ``` ### Friend ```dataview table without ID file.link as Friend, date_last_spoken as "Last Time" from #people/friend where follow_up = true and date_last_spoken <= date(today) - dur(1 week) ``` `dice: #people/friend|link` ### Coauthor ```dataview table without id file.link as Coauthor, date_last_spoken as "Last Time" from #people/coauthor where follow_up = true and date_last_spoken <= date(today) - dur(2 week) ``` `dice: #people/client|link` ## REVIEW ### Go Back To The Future `dice: #review/daily|link` ### What happened today? #### Project > [!important] Prompt > 今天关于项目的内容，请按照以下步骤进行复盘: > 1.回顾目标 2.叙述过程（5W1H）3.评估结果（SWOT）4.分析原因 （5WHYs） 5.推演规律 6.记录归档 *Achivement* *Opportunity* *Action Plan* #### About Today *win* *struggle* *other* #### Idea ### Be Grateful! - ## END-OF-DAY CHECKLIST - [ ] GTD - [ ] Speaking keeping - [ ] check [[#Habit Tracker]] - [ ] Syncthing - [ ] Obsidian Vault - [ ] Check e-mail inbox ## NOTES ### Notes created today ```dataview list where file.cday = date(<% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD") %>) sort file.ctime asc ``` ### Notes modified today ```dataview list where file.mday = date(<% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD") %>) sort file.mtime asc ``` ## HABIT TRACKER ```dataviewjs dv.span("**Speaking**") // 这里需要修改 const calendarData = { year: 2026, // (optional) defaults to current year colors: { // (optional) defaults to green blue: ["#8cb9ff", "#69a3ff", "#428bff", "#1872ff", "#0058e2"], // first entry is considered default if supplied green: ["#c6e48b", "#7bc96f", "#49af5d", "#2e8840", "#196127"], red: ["#ff9e82", "#ff7b55", "#ff4d1a", "#e73400", "#bd2a00"], orange: ["#ffa244", "#fd7f00", "#dd6f00", "#bf6000", "#9b4e00"], pink: ["#ff96cb", "#ff70b8", "#ff3a9d", "#ee0077", "#c30062"], orangeToRed: ["#ffdf04", "#ffbe04", "#ff9a03", "#ff6d02", "#ff2c01"] }, showCurrentDayBorder: true, // (optional) defaults to true defaultEntryIntensity: 4, // (optional) defaults to 4 intensityScaleStart: 10, // (optional) defaults to lowest value passed to entries.intensity intensityScaleEnd: 100, // (optional) defaults to highest value passed to entries.intensity entries: [], // (required) populated in the DataviewJS loop below } //DataviewJS loop for (let page of dv.pages('"Daily"').where(p => p.Speaking)) { //dv.span("
" + page.file.name) 这里需要修改// uncomment for troubleshooting calendarData.entries.push({ date: page.file.name, // (required) Format YYYY-MM-DD intensity: page.Speaking, // (required) the data you want to track, will map color intensities automatically 这里需要修改 content: "", // (optional) Add text to the date cell color: "orange", // (optional) Reference from 这里改成自己需要的颜色*calendarData.colors*. If no color is supplied; colors[0] is used }) } renderHeatmapCalendar(this.container, calendarData) ``` ```dataviewjs dv.span("**Exercise**") const calendarData = { year: 2026, // (optional) defaults to current year colors: { // (optional) defaults to green blue: ["#8cb9ff", "#69a3ff", "#428bff", "#1872ff", "#0058e2"], // first entry is considered default if supplied green: ["#c6e48b", "#7bc96f", "#49af5d", "#2e8840", "#196127"], red: ["#ff9e82", "#ff7b55", "#ff4d1a", "#e73400", "#bd2a00"], orange: ["#ffa244", "#fd7f00", "#dd6f00", "#bf6000", "#9b4e00"], pink: ["#ff96cb", "#ff70b8", "#ff3a9d", "#ee0077", "#c30062"], orangeToRed: ["#ffdf04", "#ffbe04", "#ff9a03", "#ff6d02", "#ff2c01"] }, showCurrentDayBorder: true, // (optional) defaults to true defaultEntryIntensity: 4, // (optional) defaults to 4 intensityScaleStart: 10, // (optional) defaults to lowest value passed to entries.intensity intensityScaleEnd: 100, // (optional) defaults to highest value passed to entries.intensity entries: [], // (required) populated in the DataviewJS loop below } //DataviewJS loop for (let page of dv.pages('"Daily"').where(p => p.Exercise)) { //dv.span("
" + page.file.name) // uncomment for troubleshooting calendarData.entries.push({ date: page.file.name, // (required) Format YYYY-MM-DD intensity: page.Exercise, // (required) the data you want to track, will map color intensities automatically content: "", // (optional) Add text to the date cell color: "pink", // (optional) Reference from *calendarData.colors*. If no color is supplied; colors[0] is used }) } renderHeatmapCalendar(this.container, calendarData) ```

content.thinking:
The user wants me to create a new template for tracking research project progress in the Template folder. Based on the existing templates, I can see the style uses frontmatter with date, tags, and uses Templater syntax (`<% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD") %>`) and Dataview queries.

Let me create a research project tracking template that follows the same style and structure as the existing templates.

input.content:
---
type: research-project
date: <% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD") %>
aliases: []
tags:
  - research/project
  - project/active
status: planning # planning / active / paused / completed
---

# Project Title

> [!info] Project Overview
> Brief description of the research project (1-2 sentences)

---

## Project Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Start Date** | <% tp.file.creation_date("YYYY-MM-DD") %> |
| **Target Completion** | |
| **Current Status** | `[[#Status]]` |
| **Priority** | high / medium / low |
| **Field** | e.g., Finance / Economics / Corporate Governance |
| **Methodology** | e.g., Empirical / Theoretical / Text Analysis |

---

## Coauthors

```dataview
table without ID
  file.link as Author, role as Role, contact as Contact
from #people/coauthor
where contains(this.file.inlinks, file.link) or contains(file.outlinks, this.file)
```

---

## Research Objectives

> [!abstract] Core Research Question
> What is the primary question this project seeks to answer?

### Primary Objective
- [ ] Define the main research hypothesis
- [ ] Identify the expected contribution to the literature

### Secondary Objectives
- [ ]
- [ ]

---

## Literature Review

| Paper | Key Findings | Relevance | Action |
|-------|--------------|-----------|--------|
| | | | |

> [!tip] Citation Management
> Use `[[<bibliography-file>]]` to link to your BibTeX file

---

## Methodology

### Data Sources
- [ ] Dataset 1: Description / Link
- [ ] Dataset 2: Description / Link

### Empirical Strategy
- **Model Specification**: ...
- **Identification Strategy**: ...
- **Robustness Checks**: ...

### Reproduction Files
```
scripts/
├── data_cleaning.do
├── regressions.do
└── figures.R
```

---

## Research Timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    title Project Timeline
    section Planning
    Literature Review      :a1, 2026-03-13, 14d
    Data Collection       :a2, after a1, 21d
    section Analysis
    Data Cleaning         :b1, after a2, 7d
    Empirical Analysis    :b2, after b1, 28d
    section Writing
    Draft Results         :c1, after b2, 14d
    Rewrite & Polish      :c2, after c1, 14d
```

---

## Progress Log

### `<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>`
- [ ] Task description
- Status: ongoing / completed / blocked

> [!caution] Current Blockers
> Note any obstacles preventing progress

---

## Key Outputs

| Output | Status | Location |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Literature Review | planned / completed | `[[output/lit-review]]` |
| Data Dictionary | planned / completed | `[[output/data-dict]]` |
| Main Results | planned / completed | `[[output/results]]` |
| Paper Draft | planned / completed | `[[papers/draft]]` |
| Slides | planned / completed | `[[output/slides]]` |

---

## Meeting Notes

### Date: <% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>

**Participants**: ...

**Discussion Points**:
- Point 1
- Point 2

**Action Items**:
- [ ] Action item 1
- [ ] Action item 2

---

## Next Actions

- [ ] [ ] Most important task (deadline: ...)
- [ ] [ ] Second priority
- [ ] [ ] Third priority

---

## Status

| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `planning` | Initial research design, literature review |
| `active` | Data collection/analysis in progress |
| `paused` | Temporarily on hold |
| `completed` | Manuscript submitted or published |

---

- **Robustness Checks**: ...

### Reproduction Files
```
scripts/
├── data_cleaning.do
├── regressions.do
└── figures.R
```

---

## Research Timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    title Project Timeline
    section Planning
    Literature Review      :a1, 2026-03-13, 14d
    Data Collection       :a2, after a1, 21d
    section Analysis
    Data Cleaning         :b1, after a2, 7d
    Empirical Analysis    :b2, after b1, 28d
    section Writing
    Draft Results         :c1, after b2, 14d
    Rewrite & Polish      :c2, after c1, 14d
```

---

## Progress Log

### `<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>`
- [ ] Task description
- Status: ongoing / completed / blocked

> [!caution] Current Blockers
> Note any obstacles preventing progress

---

## Key Outputs

| Output | Status | Location |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Literature Review | planned / completed | `[[output/lit-review]]` |
| Data Dictionary | planned / completed | `[[output/data-dict]]` |
| Main Results | planned / completed | `[[output/results]]` |
| Paper Draft | planned / completed | `[[papers/draft]]` |
| Slides | planned / completed | `[[output/slides]]` |

---

## Meeting Notes

### Date: <% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>

**Participants**: ...

**Discussion Points**:
- Point 1
- Point 2

**Action Items**:
- [ ] Action item 1
- [ ] Action item 2

---

## Next Actions

- [ ] [ ] Most important task (deadline: ...)
- [ ] [ ] Second priority
- [ ] [ ] Third priority

---

## Status

| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `planning` | Initial research design, literature review |
| `active` | Data collection/analysis in progress |
| `paused` | Temporarily on hold |
| `completed` | Manuscript submitted or published |

content.text:
已创建 `research-project.md` 模板。

## 模板结构

| 模块 | 功能 |
|------|------|
| **Project Information** | 项目基本信息（开始日期、优先级、方法论等） |
| **Research Objectives** | 核心研究问题与主次目标 |
| **Literature Review** | 文献表格 + BibTeX 链接 |
| **Methodology** | 数据来源、实证策略、复现代码结构 |
| **Research Timeline** | Mermaid Gantt 图展示项目进度 |
| **Progress Log** | 每日进度记录与阻碍标记 |
| **Key Outputs** | 输出物追踪（文献综述、数据字典、结果、论文初稿、幻灯片） |
| **Meeting Notes** | 会议纪要模板 |
| **Next Actions** | 下一步行动项 |

模板使用了 Templater 语法（`<% tp.file.creation_date() %>`），与你的 daily/weekly 模板风格一致。需要调整哪些部分？
